Description
org.apache.juneau.http.header
Next-generation HTTP header implementations.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpHeaderBean
    HttpHeaderBean.of(String name, String value)
    Creates an HttpHeaderBean with an eager string value.
